personas.name: Budget-Conscious User John
personas.description: A user who wants mental health support but finds the subscription cost too high and the free version too limited.
goals: Access meaningful mental health support at low cost
Use helpful features without a full subscription
pain_points: Most useful features are locked behind a paywall
context: Using the app while managing finances
Trying to evaluate whether the app is worth paying for
constraints: Must be able to use core features for free
Pricing should be clear before payment

personas.name: Reliability-Focused User George
personas.description: A user who relies on the app but becomes frustrated when it crashes, has login issues, or missing notifications.
goals: Use the app without crashes or bugs
pain_points: App crashes or fails to open
Notifications and saved entries are unreliable
context: Using the app as part of a daily mental health routine
Relying on reminders and saved logs to stay consistent
constraints: The app must save entries reliably
Core function screen must remain accessible

personas.name: Mood Tracker Alex
personas.description: A user who wants to log moods consistently and monitor emotional patterns over time.
pain_points: Needs clear access to mood history
Depends on reliable reminders and saved entries
context: Using the app daily or several times a week
Reviewing mood data to understand emotional changes
constraints: Entries must be recorded with the correct date

personas.name: Privacy-Aware and Security-Seeker Manny
personas.description: A user who is concerned about sensitive mental health data and usability during stressful situations.
goals: Protect personal and mental health information
pain_points: Some support pathways are not accessible to all users
context: Using the app while handling sensitive personal issues
Needing simple and accessible interactions during stress
constraints: Support options should include accessible alternatives

personas.name: Anxiety Support Seeker Claire
personas.description: A user dealing with anxiety, stress, or overwhelming emotions who uses the app for guidance, reflection, and emotional support.
pain_points: Needs support during emotionally difficult moments
Wants guidance that feels relevant and comforting
context: Using the app during stressful periods
Trying to manage anxiety without immediate professional support
constraints: Support features must be easy to access
Check-ins should be clear and not overwhelming
